compressed_prompt:
Titan makes clothing for large men. Write an advertisement for the company that would appeal to a wide audience. Make sentences short. Your response should not contain any comma.
ad, appeal
response: Titan clothes fit big men with style. We make shirts pants and jackets. Our clothes are comfortable and affordable. We have sizes for all big men. Titan is the best choice for large men who want to look great. Our clothes are made with quality materials. We care about how you look and feel. Try Titan today and see the difference. Big men deserve great clothes. Titan delivers.
